improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace. Start with three free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.png"><meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating the core value proposition and free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when the site is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, and Twitter—critical channels for reaching business professionals. The copy highlights key differentiators (Claude-powered, voice chat, trade focus) while the free search mention reduces friction and encourages clicks.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace to streamline your operations. Try three free searches — no commitment required."
improvements.rationale: This copy immediately names the product (Gideon), clearly states what it does (AI assistant for trade and business), and highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace). The subheading removes friction by emphasizing the free trial with no commitment, encouraging visitors to engage before hitting the paywall. Professional tone aligns with the target audience of business owners and traders.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to choose a membership plan to continue accessing Gideon. Plans start at just US$2 per day, billed monthly—or save 30% with annual billing. As a member, you'll unlock unlimited searches, voice chat, and a dedicated workspace built for trade and business professionals.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the conversion funnel—what happens at the paywall. By clearly explaining the transition from free trial to paid membership and reinforcing the value (unlimited access, voice chat, workspace), it reduces uncertainty and helps prospective members make a confident decision.
